title: 'org.opencontainers.image.base.digest' label is wrong with '--layers' option
body:
<!--
If you are reporting a new issue, make sure that we do not have any duplicates
already open. You can ensure this by searching the issue list for this
repository. If there is a duplicate, please close your issue and add a comment
to the existing issue instead.

If you suspect your issue is a bug, please edit your issue description to
include the BUG REPORT INFORMATION shown below. If you fail to provide this
information within 7 days, we cannot debug your issue and will close it. We
will, however, reopen it if you later provide the information.

---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST
-->

**Description**

When running buildah bud with --layers option then "org.opencontainers.image.base.digest" is not set properly.
Dockerfile:
```
FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/openjdk-17:1.13-10.1669632202

RUN echo $RANDOM > /usr/test
RUN echo $RANDOM > /usr/test2
RUN echo $RANDOM > /usr/test3
```

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Build Docker file from description - `buildah build --no-cache -t test:abc .`
2. Check  "org.opencontainers.image.base.digest"
3. Build Docker file from description - `buildah build --no-cache --layers -t test:abc .`
4. Check  "org.opencontainers.image.base.digest"


**Describe the results you received:**
Base digests are different:
2. sha256:08eb4a3026631e9114e057aa96825593c6314f8132aeb3ab068f38b56f9d5a26
4. sha256:49a96f7b362bb04ba64d74e50390f26141cfbc820492501c9caac753c8426181

**Describe the results you expected:**
Base digests should be same:
2. sha256:08eb4a3026631e9114e057aa96825593c6314f8132aeb3ab068f38b56f9d5a26
4. sha256:08eb4a3026631e9114e057aa96825593c6314f8132aeb3ab068f38b56f9d5a26

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

```
buildah-1.29.1-1.fc37.x86_64
buildah-1.26.2-1.el9_0.x86_64
```

comments.body: I tried reproducing this issue and it does not persists on the `upstream` `main` branch, could you please try again with the latest version
@flouthoc correct, I cannot reproduce it in main branch.
Cool I'm closing this issue since this is fixed in upstream.
